---
title: "4IWAS - Who are those guys?"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2015-04-19"
categories:
  - "Policy Evaluation"
  - "Teaching"
---

The 4th IWAS is coming this week. [Check out this short document](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B5jzgJCq5sU9U01IRWlRU3h4MzA/view?usp=sharing) (in spanish) to see who are those guys that will give you personal training on statistics and public policy evaluation.
